creator: mauricio@arareko.net
text:
Patch works fine.

Also, we need to remove the biology/p5-bioperl-devel and biology/p5-bioperl-run-devel ports from the tree since the BioPerl project will no longer maintain both stable and developer releases. Shall I create individual PR's or you can help me with that?

Thanks,
Mauricio.




----- Original Message ----
From: Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org>
To: mauricio@arareko.net
Cc: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
Sent: Thursday, February 26, 2009 5:20:18 AM
Subject: Re: ports/132122: [Update]biology/p5-bioperl-run:update to 1.6.1

Maintainer of biology/p5-bioperl-run,

Please note that PR ports/132122 has just been submitted.

If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
and a committer will take care of it.

The full text of the PR can be found at:
    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/132122

-- 
Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
edwin@FreeBSD.org
